message:
fix(test): fix 2 flaky/failing tests in proptest_tailer and resize_crash_forensics

proptest_tailer::select_panes_preserves_input_order: The test assumed
select_panes returns a simple prefix of the input, but the implementation
splits into high/low priority tiers with 20% fairness floor for low-prio.
Fix: assert per-tier prefix ordering (high prefix + low prefix) instead.
Also fix arb_ready_panes to properly deduplicate via HashSet (dedup_by_key
only removes consecutive duplicates after sort).

resize_crash_forensics_edge_cases: Three tests sharing process-global
OnceLock<RwLock> raced when run in parallel. clear_global() in one test
could interleave with update+get in another. Fix: consolidate into one
sequential test (global_lifecycle_update_get_clear).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
